title: Apollo Global (APO) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Apollo Global (APO) is expected to have recorded AUM growth in the third quarter of 2023.

title: Exclusive: Apollo seeking to join airline SAS investor group
text: U.S. private equity firm Apollo Global Management is seeking to join the consortium that Scandinavian airline SAS last week picked to take it through bankruptcy proceedings, according to a source familiar with the matter.

title: TeleVox Launches eCheck-in to Streamline Intake Process
text: MOBILE, Ala., Oct. 04, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- TeleVox, the industry-leading provider of omnichannel digital patient technology, today announced the launch of eCheck-in, a new tool to help healthcare organizations improve and quicken the intake process, increase revenue, and offer a modern healthcare experience to their patients.

title: Apollo Global Management: A Well Priced Fee-Earning Machine
text: Apollo runs a unique business that combines an asset-light manager and an asset-heavy insurance provider. I explain how this allows APO to charge more fees than competition and how it makes for highly visible growth. I also suggest an alternative for income investors in the form of preferred shares.

title: West Completes Sale of SchoolMessenger to PowerSchool
text: ISLANDIA, N.Y., Oct. 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- West Technology Group, LLC (the “Company” or “West”) has completed the $300 million sale of its SchoolMessenger business to PowerSchool, a leading provider of cloud-based software for K-12 education.

title: Mosaicx Hosts Webinar with Dr. Anastassia Lauterbach to Unpack Generative AI
text: Industry experts break down generative AI applications and emerging technology in customer service Industry experts break down generative AI applications and emerging technology in customer service

title: New Exchange-Traded Debt IPOs, September 2023
text: September saw no new preferred stock offerings, but three ETD offerings began trading with dividend yields ranging from 7.625% to 8.5%. CDx3 preferreds ranked 10 out of 10 are selling at an average discount to par of about 8.5% and offer an average current yield of 6.43%. Past preferred stock IPOs are now trading below par, with a surge in the "Bargain Table" count reaching near all-time highs.

title: Apollo to Announce Third Quarter Financial Results on November 1, 2023
text: NEW YORK, Oct. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apollo (NYSE: APO) plans to release financial results for the third quarter 2023 on Wednesday, November 1, 2023, before the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. Management will review Apollo's financial results at 8:30 am ET via public webcast available on Apollo's Investor Relations website at ir.apollo.com. A replay will be available one hour after the event.
